name: Hydrochlorothiazide
executiveSummary: Thiazide diuretic. Hypertension, edema, and nephrogenic diabetes insipidus.
indications:
## Main indications

Thiazide diuretic. Hypertension, edema, and nephrogenic diabetes insipidus.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 12.5–50 mg PO every 24 h in the morning.

pediatrico.dose: Neonates and infants <6 months: 2–4 mg/kg/day every 12 h; maximum 37.5 mg/day. Infants >6 months and children: 2 mg/kg/day every 12 h; maximum 100 mg/day.
pediatrico.notes: Administer with food. NSAIDs decrease antihypertensive effect. With amphotericin B increases potassium loss.

adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Hypotension, headache, dizziness, hypokalemia, hyperglycemia, hyperlipidemia, hyperuricemia, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, muscle weakness, photosensitivity.
